properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In humble adoration I kneel before Your throne, In brokenness I seek Your face alone, Above You there's no other, Who's able to restore my soul, Come and make me whole.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Breathe on me, Power of God, come in and change me, You are all I need, Holy Spirit breathe on me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm ready to surrender, To give You all my life No matter what the cost or sacrifice, Reveal to me Your calling Cleanse me from my prideful ways Use me now I pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will say of the Lord He is my strong tower, My rock and my fortress in whom I trust, In times of the storm and in tribulation, He is my help and my salvation, Breath of God, restore my soul.
